entity.description: The son of Amos, in the genealogy of our Lord (Luke 3:25).

nodes.label: Mattathias
nodes.description: The son of Amos, in the genealogy of our Lord (Luke 3:25).

verses.text: Which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Amos, which was the son of Naum, which was the son of Esli, which was the son of Nagge,
